nextStepOption.description: microcoachNextStepOption — generates one classroom activity per format per misconception

strategyTags.name: Make Structure Visible
strategyTags.whenToUse: Structural conceptual misunderstanding — expose the underlying math structure explicitly

strategyTags.name: Guided Error Analysis
strategyTags.whenToUse: Rule confusion — examine and correct a worked example containing the target error

strategyTags.name: Contrast Correct vs Incorrect
strategyTags.whenToUse: Overgeneralization — compare a correct and incorrect example side-by-side

strategyTags.name: Use Concrete Representation
strategyTags.whenToUse: Conceptual gap — use manipulatives or visual models to ground abstract reasoning

strategyTags.name: Targeted Practice
strategyTags.whenToUse: Partial procedural fluency — focused repetition on the specific error pattern

strategyTags.name: Peer Explanation
strategyTags.whenToUse: Solidifying understanding — students articulate reasoning to each other

strategyTags.name: Whole-Class Reset
strategyTags.whenToUse: Whole-class misunderstanding — reteach from a different angle for the full class
